user_intent_preservation.original_goal: Migrate 3-phase PWM motor control from TC387 GTM TOM to TC4D7 eGTM ATOM using a unified PWM driver.
user_intent_preservation.functional_behavior: On TC4D7 (KIT_A3G_TC4D7_LITE), generate 3-phase center-aligned 20 kHz PWM on eGTM ATOM0 Cluster 0 with 6 complementary outputs and 1 µs rising/falling dead-time; initial duties U=25%, V=50%, W=75% with 10% duty step; enable eGTM clocks (FXCLK0, DTM clock 0); enable syncStart and syncUpdate; trigger one period-event ISR (priority 20, IfxSrc_Tos_cpu0, vmId=IfxSrc_VmId_0) that toggles LED P03.9; duty update interval defaults to 500 ms if not specified.
user_intent_preservation.technical_approach: Use the unified high-level IfxEgtm_Pwm driver on TC4xx. Configure EGTM0 ATOM0 Cluster 0 for center-aligned PWM at 20 kHz, map the requested TOUT pins via IfxEgtm_PinMap, enable FXCLK0 and DTM clock 0, configure complementary outputs with 1 µs dead-time, and route a single period-event interrupt to toggle P03.9. Perform runtime duty updates with IfxEgtm_Pwm_updateChannelsDutyImmediate while keeping sync updates enabled.

driver_selection.selection_rationale: Unified high-level PWM driver supports eGTM ATOM on TC4xx with center-aligned generation, complementary outputs via DTM, synchronous group updates, and integrated interrupt handling—matching the migration target and features.

runtime_function.name: updateEgtmAtom3phInvDuty
runtime_function.purpose: Apply duty cycle updates (e.g., 10% step) to the 3-phase complementary pairs with synchronized update behavior.

driver_changes: IfxGtm_Pwm → IfxEgtm_Pwm (TC3xx to TC4xx unified PWM driver)
migration_notes.context_preserved: The migration keeps the original 3-phase inverter behavior: center-aligned 20 kHz PWM on EGTM ATOM0 Cluster 0 with 6 complementary outputs, 1 µs dead-time, initial duty ratios (U=25%, V=50%, W=75%), syncStart and syncUpdate enabled, and a single period-event ISR toggling LED P03.9. Clock sources are set to FXCLK0 and DTM clock 0. Runtime duty updates use the unified driver's synchronous update API. Note: verify TOUT55/P21.4 availability for V_HS in IfxEgtm_PinMap on TC4D7 (BGA436_COM) as flagged by pin validation.

PWM.rationale: Driver locked by refiner node (user explicit or engine-scored)
